name: Avalon Check Cashing
description_short: Avalon Check Cashing offers check cashing and financial services at their Inglewood, CA location with extended weekday hours and convenient weekend access.
description_long: Avalon Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located at 11050 S Prairie Ave in Inglewood, California. The business operates as a traditional financial services provider for customers who need immediate access to funds from checks without maintaining a bank account or paying traditional banking fees. The company has been established in the Inglewood area and maintains a physical storefront presence to serve the local community. Avalon Check Cashing provides check cashing services as their primary offering, enabling customers to convert checks into cash quickly. Based on available information, they operate a physical location with extended business hours to accommodate working customers. The company accepts phone inquiries at (310) 412-0300 for customers seeking information about their services or rates. Avalon Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended weekday hours, remaining open until 7 PM Monday through Friday, which accommodates customers with traditional work schedules who may have limited availability during standard banking hours. Weekend service is also available on Saturdays until 6 PM and Sundays from 9 AM to 3 PM, providing flexibility for customers who cannot visit during weekdays. Their physical location in Inglewood places them in an accessible community hub for the local population. However, the available information is limited to basic operational details accessible through a Waze business listing. Specific details about check cashing fees, accepted check types, maximum check amounts, alternative services (such as money orders or wire transfers), customer reviews, or other service offerings are not available from the provided website content. The company's digital presence appears minimal, with no independent website or social media presence documented in the available data. Customers considering Avalon Check Cashing should contact them directly to understand their specific fee structure, any ID requirements, and other terms before using their services.
pros: Extended weekday hours open until 7 PM Monday-Friday, accommodating working customers
Weekend availability including Saturday and Sunday hours
Located in Inglewood with street-level physical storefront accessibility
Direct phone line (310) 412-0300 for customer inquiries
Established local business presence serving the Inglewood community
cons: No independent website or online presence beyond Waze listing limits information access
Specific fee structure and pricing not disclosed in available information
Limited details on accepted check types, maximum amounts, or service scope
No documented customer reviews or ratings available for assessment
Minimal operational transparency regarding ID requirements or terms of service
best_for: Unbanked customers who need immediate check-to-cash conversion without a bank account
Individuals with irregular income who prefer check cashing over bank deposits
Inglewood-area residents seeking convenient evening or weekend check cashing access
diagnosis: Avalon Check Cashing is best for unbanked individuals in the Inglewood area seeking quick check-to-cash conversion with flexible hours including evenings and weekends. The main caveat is the complete absence of published fee information, service details, or customer feedback—prospective users must call directly to understand costs and terms before using the service.
